name: SearchField
description: Search input with a built-in search icon and optional clear button. Purpose-built for search — simpler than InputField. Extends HTML input attributes (except size and type).

props.name: label
props.description: Label text above the search field.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Callback when clear button is clicked.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element. Layout composition only — do NOT use for custom styling.

states.rationale: SearchField hover changes border color only — no background OKLCH shift or overlay. Same token-swap pattern as InputField.

keyboard.Tab: Move focus to/from the input and clear button
keyboard.Escape: No default — consumer may wire to clear or blur

propertyMapping.note: Visual-only Figma property. In code, states come from CSS pseudo-classes (:hover, :focus-within) and data-disabled attribute.
Figma 'text' maps to the HTML input 'value' attribute passed through SearchFieldProps.
HTML attribute pass-through. Default 'Search' in both Figma and code.

useWhen: Search or filter inputs where the search icon is always visible
Quick-filter fields in toolbars, tables, or sidebars
Simple search with no hint, error, or icon customization needed
doNotUseFor: Multi-line search or chat — use Textarea or MessageComposer

knownDeviations.description: Figma component does not include a label row. In code, SearchField renders an optional label above the field box. Label is a code-only prop.
Figma shows the clear button only in the focused state. In code, clear button appears whenever the input has a value and is not disabled (regardless of focus).
